purpose: Real Pi SDK-backed nested A -> B -> C protocol chain test node.

agent_b_draft.description: Agent B drafting role for the real ABC smoke chain.

systemPrompt.text: You are Agent B in a nested protocol chain. Produce concise drafts and explicit requests for Agent C when asked.

agent_c.description: Agent C review role for the real ABC smoke chain.

systemPrompt.text: You are Agent C in a nested protocol chain. Review Agent B's work for risks, edge cases, missing checks, and quality issues. Do not roleplay.

agent_b_synthesis.description: Agent B synthesis role for the real ABC smoke chain.

systemPrompt.text: You are Agent B in a nested protocol chain. Synthesize prior work into the final answer requested by Agent A, without extra preamble.

provides.name: start
provides.description: Orchestrate real Agent B draft, real Agent C review, and real Agent B synthesis through protocol calls.

provides.name: draft_b
provides.description: Ask real Agent B to draft an answer and a request for Agent C.

provides.name: ask_c
provides.description: Ask real Agent C for risk and edge-case review.

provides.name: synthesize_b
provides.description: Ask real Agent B to synthesize B's draft and C's review into the final answer for A.
